name: Ryu-Ge Rivalry
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>三</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>流</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>る</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>転</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Special Summon 1 "Ryu-Ge" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY, but return it to the hand during the End Phase. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Ryu-Ge" Continuous Spell in your banishment, GY, or field; place it on the bottom of the Deck, then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Ryu-Ge Rivalry" once per turn.
eff: Special Summon 1 "Ryu-Ge" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY, but return it to the hand during the End Phase. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Ryu-Ge" Continuous Spell in your banishment, GY, or field; place it on the bottom of the Deck, then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Ryu-Ge Rivalry" once per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
Places cards from the player's field on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
Places the player's banished cards on the bottom of the Deck
